mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_photos (device_id, customer_id, file_name, file_path, file_size, mime_type, width, height, description, tags, uploaded_by_device, taken_at, latitude, longitude) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{customerId}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{width}, #{height}, #{description}, #{tags}, #{uploadedByDevice}, #{takenAt}, #{latitude}, #{longitude})
mapper.select: SELECT dp.*, d.number as device_number FROM device_photos dp JOIN devices d ON dp.device_id = d.id WHERE dp.id = #{id}
SELECT dp.*, d.number as device_number FROM device_photos dp JOIN devices d ON dp.device_id = d.id WHERE dp.device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY dp.created_at DESC
SELECT dp.*, d.number as device_number FROM device_photos dp JOIN devices d ON dp.device_id = d.id WHERE dp.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY dp.created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM device_photos WHERE created_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (INTERVAL '1 day' * #{days})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO photo_upload_requests (device_id, customer_id, status, description) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{customerId}, #{status}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT pur.*, d.number as device_number FROM photo_upload_requests pur JOIN devices d ON pur.device_id = d.id WHERE pur.id = #{id}

SELECT pur.*, d.number as device_number FROM photo_upload_requests pur JOIN devices d ON pur.device_id = d.id WHERE pur.device_id = #{deviceId} AND pur.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY pur.requested_at ASC
SELECT pur.*, d.number as device_number FROM photo_upload_requests pur JOIN devices d ON pur.device_id = d.id WHERE pur.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY pur.requested_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM photo_upload_requests WHERE status IN ('COMPLETED', 'FAILED', 'CANCELLED') AND completed_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - (INTERVAL '1 day' * #{days})
